info.english_meaning: to make someone stay to make something fragrant to burn incense sticks
info.hindI_arTa: vAsita karanA suganDita karanA Dupa denA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: adantaH  vasyati stamBane vaste CAdane vAsayedvaset  nivAse vAsayet snehe vAsayatyupasevane  (Slo. 187- 188) ( vasennivAse vasayecca vaste tvAcCAdane stamBana eva vasyet  nivAsayatyAcCadane nivAseH Asevane vAsayatIti vAse ..) iti devaH
